description:
As a Farm and Home Management Educator conducting an Integrated Pest Management (IPM) workshop, document a pest event and its treatment by creating two sequential log entries in farmOS Field Kit.

Create an Observation log dated November 15, 2024, with the notes: "Aphid infestation observed on soybean crop in Field B, Rows 12-18. Estimated 30% of plants affected with moderate colony density on leaf undersides. Species appears to be soybean aphid (Aphis glycines). Recommend immediate treatment."

Create an Input log dated November 15, 2024, for a quantity of 12 liters with the notes: "Applied organic neem oil spray to soybean Field B, Rows 12-18 in response to aphid infestation. Concentration: 2% solution at 4 liters per acre using backpack sprayer. Weather: 72F, wind calm, no rain forecast 48hrs."
